prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game upgrade icon sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 10 clearly distinguishable upgrade icons for a top-down post-apocalyptic armored car survival game.
Subject: 10 isolated UI icons arranged in a clean 5x2 grid, each icon centered in its own cell with generous padding and no background plate
Icons to include, in order left to right, top to bottom:
1. damage boost: a glowing explosive shell
2. fire rate boost: a metal ammo belt with speed streaks
3. multishot: two parallel shells or twin muzzle flashes
4. spread count: a fan-shaped triple shot pattern
5. knockback: an impact round with a shockwave ring
6. slow: a green chemical canister or sticky slowing agent
7. explosion radius: an orange expanding blast ring
8. pierce: a blue armor-piercing projectile with penetration trail
9. chain lightning: a purple electric arc chain
10. chain range: a purple-blue electric radius pulse
Style: premium mobile game UI icons, wasteland mech aesthetic, industrial military readability, bold silhouette design, icon-first not scene-first
Important constraints: each icon must be a pure standalone HUD icon with no base, no terrain, no frame, no pedestal, no decorative platform, no repeated icon duplicates, no overlapping elements across cells
Lighting: crisp highlights, soft glow accents, strong contrast for small-size readability
Color palette: steel gray, amber orange, warning yellow, acid green, electric blue, violet energy accents
Background: fully transparent
Composition: one icon per cell, evenly spaced, identical visual weight, clean cell separation
Avoid: text, labels, logos, item piles, treasure chests, scenery, painterly clutter, photorealistic mini scenes

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game reward icon sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 6 clearly distinguishable reward and currency icons for a top-down post-apocalyptic armored car survival game.
Subject: 6 isolated UI icons arranged in a clean 3x2 grid, each icon centered in its own cell with generous padding and no background plate
Icons to include, in order left to right, top to bottom:
1. coins: stacked rugged gold coins
2. parts: mechanical scrap parts bundle with bolts and gears
3. rare chip: a glowing high-tech chip module
4. supply token: a military supply emblem coin
5. rare chest token: a premium loot token with chest symbol
6. energy core: a glowing reactor core or condensed energy cell
Style: premium mobile game loot icons, wasteland industrial aesthetic, collectible readability, icon-first not scene-first
Important constraints: each icon must be a pure standalone HUD icon with no pedestal, no terrain, no storage crate, no environment props, no duplicate concepts, no overlapping elements across cells
Lighting: bright readable highlights, clear silhouette, subtle glow where appropriate
Color palette: brass gold, dark steel, amber orange, cool cyan, small magenta accent only for rare-tech elements
Background: fully transparent
Composition: one icon per cell, evenly spaced, balanced icon scale, clean separation
Avoid: text, labels, scenery, painterly item piles, treasure box objects replacing tokens, realistic still-life composition
